name: USS PC-451 (PC-451)
events: 6 Jan 1945 USS Hackleback (T/Lt.Cdr. F.E. Janney, USN) conducted special tests off Key West with USS PC-451 (Lt. P.W. Thornton, USNR).
7 Jan 1945 USS Hackleback (T/Lt.Cdr. F.E. Janney, USN) conducted special tests off Key West with USS PC-451 (Lt. P.W. Thornton, USNR).
11 Apr 1945 USS Dentuda (Cdr. J.S. McCain, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Key West together with USS PC-451 (Lt.(jg) H.D. Bemiss, Jr., USNR).
